title: Video One: Morning Routine
script:
Start your morning right with these three simple habits.

[Visual: peaceful morning sunrise over mountains]
Wake up at the same time every day. Your body thrives on routine.

[Visual: person drinking water in the morning]
Drink a full glass of water before coffee. You have been dehydrated for eight hours.

[Visual: person stretching or doing yoga]
Move your body for at least 10 minutes. Stretch, walk, or do yoga. Just get moving.

title: Video Two: Evening Wind Down
script:
How you end your day matters just as much as how you start it.

[Visual: calm evening sunset over ocean]
Put your phone away one hour before bed. Blue light disrupts your sleep cycle.

[Visual: notebook and pen on desk]
Write down three things you are grateful for. Gratitude rewires your brain for happiness.

[Visual: person sleeping peacefully]
Read a physical book for 20 minutes. It signals your brain that it is time to rest.
